name: Chocolate Espresso Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Unsalted butter, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a food processor, add cookie crumbs and grind into fine crumbs. Add butter and blend until smooth. Press crust into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Chill while preparing the filling.
3. In a large bowl with an electric mixer, beat cream cheese until smooth. Add white and brown sugars and mix well. Add sour cream and ricotta and blend well. Add eggs and beat until mixture is smooth. Add melted chocolate, espresso, vanilla, and almond extract. Blend until mixture is very smooth. Pour mixture into the springform pan.
4. Bake for approximately 1 hour. Turn off oven and crack the door about 1 inch. Leave the cake in the oven for another hour, then remove and cool to room temperature.
5. For the glaze, melt chocolate and butter over low heat in a small saucepan and stir until smooth. Add pecans and stir until coated. Pour glaze over the top of the cheesecake and smooth to the edges. Let some run over the edges if desired. Chill until firm and cut into wedges to serve.
